property.name: fieldId
property.label: Field Id
property.description: You must copy the API Name into this field

property.name: labelFontSize
property.label: Label Font Size
property.description: Label Font Size - Small, Medium or Large

property.name: hintText
property.label: Hint Text
property.description: Hint Text - appears below the label giving the user a hint

property.name: allowPast
property.label: Allow dates in past
property.description: Check the checkbox if you want to allow dates in the past

property.name: allowToday
property.label: Allow today
property.description: Check the checkbox if you want to today as a date

property.name: allowFuture
property.label: Allow dates in future
property.description: Check the checkbox if you want to allow dates in the future
